top_stories.title: Eneos to buy Chevron fuel assets for $2.17B
top_stories.summary: JAPANESE ENERGY GROUP Eneos Holdings, Inc. will acquire the fuel and lubricant marketing businesses of Chevron Corp. across the Asia-Pacific region in a $2.17-billion deal that includes operations in the Philippines. top_stories.title: Higher fares dent Cebu Pacific’s April traffic
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Pihlippines – Higher fuel surcharges and air fares weighed on Cebu Pacific’s April passenger traffic as travellers cut back on pricier tickets. top_stories.title: Diesel, gasoline prices seen rising next week
